headline: Elizabeth Warren asks Meta, Amazon, and others why they're laying workers off despite tax perks
summary: Sen. Elizabeth Warren is grilling several major employers, including Amazon, Target, and UPS, about their recent spate of layoffs amid tax perks to corporations.

raw.headline: Elizabeth Warren asks Meta, Amazon, and others why they're laying workers off despite tax perks
raw.summary: Sen. Elizabeth Warren is grilling several major employers, including Amazon, Target, and UPS, about their recent spate of layoffs amid tax perks to corporations.

headline: Amazon overtakes US Postal Service as largest parcel carrier
summary: Amazon has taken the lead as the largest U.S. domestic parcel carrier and smaller independent couriers are also taking market share from the U.S. Postal Service, FedEx and UPS. The post Amazon overtakes US Postal Service as largest parcel carrier appeared first on FreightWaves.

raw.headline: Amazon overtakes US Postal Service as largest parcel carrier

headline: FedEx to Report Q3 Earnings: Should You Buy, Sell or Hold the Stock?
summary: FDX heads into Q3 earnings with rising estimates as DRIVE cost cuts, AI-led efficiencies and January rate hikes are expected to support margins and revenue growth.

headline: UPS Has Shed 18% in the Past Month as Its Amazon Breakup Enters the Final Stretch
summary: Still one of the most notable vehicles on the road, United Parcel Service (NYSE:UPS) has shed 18.48% over the past month, with shares near $97 after briefly touching $116.63 in the 30 days following January earnings. The catalyst: UPS is deliberately shrinking its revenue base to rebuild around higher-margin customers. Shrinking on Purpose, and Investors ... UPS Has Shed 18% in the Past Month as Its Amazon Breakup Enters the Final Stretch

headline: Strait of Hormuz standoff puts supply of America's generic drug prescriptions at risk
summary: Half of US generic drugs are made in India and transit the Strait of Hormuz. Supply chains prepare for emergencies, but prescription stockpiles are limited.

raw.headline: Strait of Hormuz standoff puts supply of America's generic drug prescriptions at risk
